name: openclaw-file-guard
description: Intercept tool-call file access and report events to ClawVault dashboard

mode.description: log = report only; strict = block offending tool calls

extraPaths.description: Additional glob patterns to treat as sensitive (appended to watch_paths/watch_patterns fetched from ClawVault)

extraExtensions.description: Additional filename extensions (e.g. .pem) that always count as sensitive

refreshIntervalSeconds.description: How often to re-pull ClawVault config
